title: ‘Ask YouTube’ brings AI-powered conversational search to video, adds Gemini Omni to Shorts
summary: Google introduces 'Ask YouTube,' an AI-powered conversational search tool that lets users interact with video content through natural language queries. The feature also brings Gemini Omni to YouTube Shorts, extending Google's AI integration across its video platform.
content: Google is completely revamping its search experience, and that doesn't stop at YouTube.

zh.title: "Ask YouTube"为视频带来AI驱动的对话式搜索，为Shorts添加Gemini Omni
zh.summary: Google推出"Ask YouTube"，这是一个AI驱动的对话式搜索工具，让用户能通过自然语言查询与视频内容互动。该功能还为YouTube Shorts带来了Gemini Omni，扩展了Google在其视频平台上的AI整合。

title: Mercedes’ electric AMG GT 4-door coupe can go 0-60 in 2 seconds
summary: Mercedes unveiled its new AMG GT 4-door electric coupe sedan, capable of accelerating from 0-60 mph in just 2 seconds. The ultra-high-performance EV features three axial flux motors delivering 1,153 horsepower, positioning it to compete with hypercars.
content:
The era of ultra-high performance Mercedes EVs is here. The German automaker finally revealed its new super sedan, the AMG GT 4-door coupe, with technology borrowed from the automaker's XX concept that last year made history by driving 24,901 miles in under 8 days at Nardò Ring in southern Italy. 
With the production model, Mercedes rethought its approach to motors and batteries in the hopes of delivering a high performance vehicle that could go toe-to-toe with even some hypercars. The new AMG GT utilizes three axial flux motors developed by Mercedes subsidiary YASA, delivering up to 1,153 horsepower and 1,475 lb-ft of torque. Mercedes clai …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 梅赛德斯电动AMG GT四门轿跑车0-60加速仅需2秒
zh.summary: 梅赛德斯推出新款AMG GT四门电动轿跑车，可在2秒内从0-60 mph加速。这款超高性能电动车配备三个轴向通量马达，输出功率达1,153马力，使其能与超跑相竞争。
